label: SBLJ_label
reason: Mario repeatedly performs backwards long jumps while moving sideways along the red-carpeted stairs in Peach’s Castle. His long-jump pose is seen on successive frames as he hugs the stair wall, rapidly gaining speed. He then clips past geometry with an abrupt viewpoint shift to the under-floor area, consistent with a Side BLJ bypassing the star door. This matches the SBLJ cues; it is not DDD Skip because the location is the lobby stairs, not the basement entrance to Dire, Dire Docks.
